name: Emon.fracLut
title: Percentage of Grid Cell for Each Land-Use Tile
description: End of month values (not monthly mean); note that percentage should be reported as percentage of land grid cell (example: frac\_lnd = 0.5, frac\_ocn = 0.5, frac\_crop\_lnd = 0.2 (of land portion of grid cell), then frac\_lut(crop) = 0.5\*0.2 = 0.1)
processing note: CHANGE SINCE CMIP6 in Cell Methods - CMIP6:area: mean where land over all\_area\_types time: mean CMIP7:area: mean time: point, CHANGE SINCE CMIP6 in Dimensions - CMIP6:longitude latitude landUse time CMIP7:longitude latitude landuse time1,
